title: Set up Cloudflare R2 object storage for file uploads
summary: Create an R2 bucket, configure S3-compatible credentials, generate presigned URLs for direct client uploads, and wire up Next.js API routes to serve and manage files.
declaration: I will set up Cloudflare R2 object storage. R2 is S3-compatible with zero egress fees — unlike AWS S3. I'll create the bucket, configure credentials, and implement presigned upload URLs so files upload directly from the browser without proxying through your server.
